questions.question: Which algorithm is a symmetric block cipher?
questions.description: AES is a symmetric block cipher widely used for encryption.

questions.question: What must be unique for AES-GCM encryption under the same key?
questions.description: AES-GCM requires nonce uniqueness with a given key.

questions.question: Which cipher is commonly used for high-speed stream encryption?
questions.description: ChaCha20 is a fast stream cipher often paired with Poly1305 for authentication.
